summary: This cluster investigates the morphology and taxonomy of the haptophyte alga *Prymnesium patelliferum*, with a specific geographic focus on populations from Hwajinpo Lake in South Korea. The research provides detailed descriptions of the species’ cellular architecture, including its distinctive shape, flagella arrangement, and scale structure, emphasizing its taxonomic significance. The findings contribute to a broader understanding of the distribution and physical characteristics of *P. patelliferum* within Korean aquatic ecosystems.
